title: The Giant Diamond Robbery
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo goes undercover at a golf tournament to stop a thief from stealing a giant diamond on a golden cup! 💎

q.en: Who is the narrator of the story and the publisher of The Rodent's Gazette?
q.zh: 谁是这本书的讲述者，也是《 鼠民公报》的出版人？

explain.en: Geronimo Stilton introduces himself as the publisher of The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular newspaper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿在故事开头自我介绍，说是老鼠岛最受欢迎的报纸《 鼠民公报》的出版人。

q.en: What precious trophy is being guarded at the Mouseport golf tournament?
q.zh: 在老鼠港高尔夫锦标赛上，大家守护的珍贵奖杯是什么？

options.en: A solid gold cup with a giant diamond on top
options.zh: 一座纯金打造、顶部镶着巨型钻石的奖杯
一座银制的奶酪冠军奖杯
一个巨大的吱吱叫的足球

explain.en: The Super Mouse Cup is made of solid gold with a giant diamond on top, and the winner keeps it for one year.
explain.zh: 超级老鼠杯是纯金打造的，顶部镶着一颗巨型钻石，获胜者可以保管它一年。

q.en: Who is the secret agent with the code name OOK?
q.zh: 代号 OOK 的特工是谁？

explain.en: Kornelius von Kickpaw is Geronimo's friend from elementary school and a secret agent whose code name is OOK.
explain.zh: 科尼利厄斯·冯·基克帕是杰罗尼摩小学时的朋友，也是一名代号为 OOK 的特工。

q.en: In which Mouse Island city does the golf tournament take place?
q.zh: 高尔夫锦标赛在老鼠岛的哪座城市举行？

explain.en: Geronimo and his grandfather fly to Mouseport, where the Super Mouse Cup tournament is held.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩和爷爷乘飞机去了老鼠港，超级老鼠杯锦标赛就在那里举行。

q.en: Who was really pretending to be 'Molly Ratmousen, Lady Legend of Golf'?
q.zh: 真正假扮成“高尔夫女传奇莫莉·鼠莫森”的人是谁？

explain.en: The fake Molly pulled off a rubber mask, wig, and false teeth to reveal she was The Shadow, the notorious thief.
explain.zh: 假莫莉摘下橡胶面具、假发和假牙，露出了她其实是臭名昭著的盗贼影子大盗。

q.en: How did the cheater make Geronimo's golf ball land in bad spots?
q.zh: 作弊者是用什么办法让杰罗尼摩的高尔夫球落到糟糕地方的？

options.en: By controlling it with a remote-control ball
options.zh: 用遥控高尔夫球远程控制它

options.en: By gluing his shoes to the ground
By feeding him a poisoned sandwich
By putting a rubber snake in the hole
options.zh: 在球洞里放了一条橡胶蛇

explain.en: The Shadow used remote-control balls; one gadget had a red button marked GS (Geronimo Stilton) to steer his ball.
explain.zh: 影子大盗用了遥控球，其中一个遥控器上有标着 GS（杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿）的红色按钮来操控他的球。

q.en: Where was the real Molly Ratmousen found at the end?
q.zh: 真正的莫莉·鼠莫森最后是在哪里被发现的？

options.en: Tied up in a broom closet
options.zh: 被绑在了一间扫帚储藏室里
乘坐迷你直升机飞走了

explain.en: Geronimo heard a muffled noise, opened a broom closet door, and found the real Molly tied up and gagged.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩听到闷闷的声音，推开扫帚储藏室的门，发现真正的莫莉被绑着并塞住了嘴。

q.en: What did The Shadow plan to do with the giant diamond?
q.zh: 影子大盗打算怎么处理那颗巨型钻石？

options.en: Donate it to a cheese museum
Keep it on her own trophy shelf
options.zh: 自己摆在奖杯架上收藏

options.en: Give it to The Daily Rat

explain.en: OOK warns Geronimo that the thief plans to steal the cup and sell the diamond to cat pirates.
explain.zh: OOK 提醒杰罗尼摩，盗贼打算偷走奖杯，并把钻石卖给猫海盗。

q.en: What is the nickname of Geronimo's grandfather, the golf legend?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩那位高尔夫传奇爷爷的外号是什么？

explain.en: William Shortpaws's membership card shows his nickname 'Surestroke' Shortpaws, president of the New Mouse City Golf Club.
explain.zh: 威廉·肖特波的会员卡上写着他的外号是“稳杆”肖特波，还是新老鼠城高尔夫俱乐部的会长。

q.en: Who cheers Geronimo on to make the winning shot at the final hole?
q.zh: 在最后一洞，是谁为杰罗尼摩加油，让他打出制胜一球？

options.en: His family and friends including Thea, Trap, Benjamin, and Hercule Poirat
options.zh: 他的家人和朋友，包括茜薇娅、特拉普、本杰明和赫拉克·波拉特
影子大盗和萨莉·鼠莫森

explain.en: At hole 18 Geronimo sees his sister Thea, cousin Trap, nephew Benjamin, detective Hercule Poirat, and others cheering him on.
explain.zh: 在第 18 洞，杰罗尼摩看到妹妹茜薇娅、表哥特拉普、侄子本杰明、侦探赫拉克·波拉特等人为他加油。
